ingest_latency_p95_ms.description: Ingest latency P95 must be ≤1 second (product claim)

extraction_recall.description: Extraction must capture ≥60% of golden facts (baseline; >0.6 indicates truncation/hallucination issues)

extraction_precision.description: Extracted facts must be ≥70% correct (baseline; <0.7 indicates LLM hallucination)

extraction_span_fidelity.description: Source spans must be ≥95% verbatim substrings of raw source (stringent; provenance is the differentiator)

retrieval_recall_at_5_hybrid.description: Hybrid retrieval must find ≥50% of relevant facts in top-5 (baseline)

retrieval_recall_at_10_hybrid.description: Hybrid retrieval must find ≥70% of relevant facts in top-10 (main threshold; beats keyword-only ~40%)

retrieval_mrr_hybrid.description: Mean reciprocal rank for hybrid ≥0.3 (first relevant item ≤rank 3 on average)

retrieval_ndcg_at_10_hybrid.description: Normalized DCG@10 for hybrid ≥0.6 (ranking quality accounting for relevance gradation)

retrieval_latency_p95_ms.description: Search latency P95 must be ≤2 seconds (product claim)

sensitivity_block_rate.description: Differential test (requires configured provider): zero facts derived from personal/relationship conversations while control conversations produce facts (zero tolerance for leaks)

mcp_error_correctness.description: 100% of malformed MCP requests must return structured error envelopes (not 500 errors)

extraction_provenance_completeness.description: Every extracted fact must carry source_span + confidence_tier + derivation_method + derivation_model (PIPE-02, absolute)

retrieval_paraphrase_recall_at_10.description: Semantic or hybrid mode must find >=2/3 of semantic_only paraphrase queries in top-10 (embeddings must add recall beyond FTS); only enforced when embeddings enabled

retrieval_semantic_lift.description: Semantic paraphrase recall must exceed keyword paraphrase recall (embeddings demonstrably add value); only enforced when embeddings enabled

checks.name: ingest
checks.details: Ingested 4/4 conversations. P95 latency: 21ms (threshold: 1000ms). Success rate: 100%.

checks.name: extraction
checks.skip_reason: No facts extracted for any conversation — likely gate-blocked (see details)
checks.details: No facts appeared for any control conversation despite a configured provider and completed jobs. Most likely the sensitivity gate blocked them (it blocks unclassified content by default and its decision is not observable via API — F15/F22 in docs/recommendations.md). Check server logs for 'Sensitivity gate: ... blocked=True'.

checks.name: retrieval
checks.details:
Retrieval evaluation across 13 queries:
  KEYWORD: R@5=87.50%, R@10=87.50%, MRR=0.88, nDCG=0.88, P95=26ms (adversarial: 2 tested, 0 crashed)
  SEMANTIC: R@5=100.00%, R@10=100.00%, MRR=1.00, nDCG=1.00, P95=116ms (adversarial: 2 tested, 0 crashed)
  HYBRID: R@5=100.00%, R@10=100.00%, MRR=1.00, nDCG=1.00, P95=122ms (adversarial: 2 tested, 0 crashed)
  PARAPHRASE (semantic_only): keyword R@10=0% (expected ~0), semantic R@10=100%, hybrid R@10=100%, semantic_lift=+100% (need ≥66% and lift>0)
Thresholds: R@10≥70% (hybrid), P95≤2000ms, hybrid ≥ best single mode

checks.name: sensitivity
checks.skip_reason: Extraction control did not produce facts — differential test inconclusive
checks.details: Control failed: extraction check produced no facts for non-sensitive conversations, so 'zero facts from sensitive items' proves nothing.

checks.name: mcp
checks.details: MCP protocol (SSE) contract: ingest_accepted=✓, retrieve_provenance=✓, retrieve_budget_metadata=✓, structured_errors=✓.
